{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Striker Trial targets
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The targets in the [[Striker Trial]] are black blobs floating behind a hazy wall of [[aura]] that re-form if cut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
